query: SELECT ta.id, ta.leadManagerId, ta.acquisitionManagerId, CONCAT(tm1.name, ' (', tm1.teamRole, ')') as leadManagerIdInfo, CONCAT(tm2.name, ' (', tm2.teamRole, ')') as acquisitionManagerIdInfo FROM team_assignments ta LEFT JOIN team_members tm1 ON ta.leadManagerId = tm1.id LEFT JOIN team_members tm2 ON ta.acquisitionManagerId = tm2.id ORDER BY ta.id
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT ta.id, ta.leadManagerId, ta.acquisitionManagerId, CONCAT(tm1.name, ' (', tm1.teamRole, ')') as leadManagerIdInfo, CONCAT(tm2.name, ' (', tm2.teamRole, ')') as acquisitionManagerIdInfo FROM team_assignments ta LEFT JOIN team_members tm1 ON ta.leadManagerId = tm1.id LEFT JOIN team_members tm2 ON ta.acquisitionManagerId = tm2.id ORDER BY ta.id
